title: Weather Tricks Turn Serious
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on weather tricks turn serious, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Weather Tricks Turn Serious. Nami is pushed into a dangerous fight where every mistake with the Clima-Tact could kill her. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It won't matter where you hide or how far you try to run away...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So is she a devil fruit user too!? or does she have some sort of special spear-like weapon...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: After eating the "Toga Tope Fruit," I've become a thorn- human.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can grow thorns from any part of my body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Consumers can be discovered a social concrete

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If I get caught, I can't get a little bit of it.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're seriously going to try to fight me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I've got more than a fair chance of winning!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Have a taste of my new weapon!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It can conjure clouds! Summer rain! Call forth winds!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Depending on how it's assembled, the Clima-Tact can create natural disasters of all kinds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Now I just push this button here...

summary: This part develops weather tricks turn serious and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
